meta.name: 代码开发
meta.description: 星构Astra 默认工作台：完整的 AI 辅助代码开发环境——文件树、编辑器、终端、Git、LSP、调试、和所有内置 Agent。等价于升级前的 IDE 体验。
meta.author: 星构Astra

agents.tagline: 复杂问题研究、代码搜索、多步任务执行
agents.whenToUse: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks.

agents.tagline: 只读的文件/代码快速探索
agents.whenToUse: Fast agent specialized for exploring codebases. Quick find files by patterns, search code for keywords, answer questions about the codebase.

agents.tagline: 软件架构师：设计实施方案、梳理架构取舍
agents.whenToUse: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans, identifies critical files, considers architectural trade-offs.

agents.tagline: 并行编排多个 Sub-Agent，适合大型复合任务
agents.whenToUse: Orchestration agent that splits complex tasks into parallel work streams and delegates to specialized sub-agents.

agents.tagline: 结构化调试：假设-证据-最小修复
agents.whenToUse: Structured debugging: hypothesis, evidence (logs/tests), minimal fix. Can nest REPL for tight inner loops.

agents.tagline: 只读验证：跑构建/测试、确认行为
agents.whenToUse: Read-only verification: run builds/tests, capture logs, confirm behavior. Use before marking work complete.

agents.tagline: 回答关于本项目 / Claude CLI / SDK 的用法问题
agents.whenToUse: Answer questions about Claude Code, Anthropic CLI/SDK patterns, and how agent tools behave in this codebase.

agents.tagline: 配置 CLI status line / 会话 footer
agents.whenToUse: Configure CLI status lines, session footers, or prompt-adjacent UI for this app.

teams.name: 单 Agent（默认）
teams.description: 不启用 Team 协作，只使用当前选中的 Agent

teams.name: 研究→规划→验证
teams.description: Explore 先做研究 → Plan 生成方案 → Verification 最后验证实施结果

teams.name: 协调者主导
teams.description: Coordinator 拆任务并并行分派给专业 sub-agent

welcomeMessage: 代码开发工作台已就绪。你可以直接开始使用 AI Chat、打开文件、执行终端命令——和升级前一样。
